---
id: settle
title: "Mark settlement as settled"
description: "Transitions the settlement to SETTLED status and projects the cash balance movement."
sidebar_label: "Mark settlement as settled"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Mark settlement as settled"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/settlements/{id}/settle"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Transitions the settlement to SETTLED status and projects the cash balance movement.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
